200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, Servant of Night silences the weapon of a random enemy. The target of the ability can’t use the weapon’s abilities for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Servant of Night silences the weapon of 2 random enemies. The target of the ability can’t use the weapon’s abilities for 5 sec. Once in a while, Servant of the Night deals pure damage to the enemy with the least health equal to 25% of their max health and restores health to an ally with the least health equal to the damage dealt by the ability. If the ability kills a target, Servant of the Night has a 75% chance to resurrect a random ally with 30% health.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Servant of Night silences the weapon of 3 random enemies. The target of the ability can’t use the weapon’s abilities for 5 sec. Once in a while, Servant of the Night deals pure damage to the enemy with the least health equal to 40% of their max health and restores health to an ally with the least health equal to the damage dealt by the ability. If the ability kills a target, Servant of the Night has a 90% chance to resurrect a random ally with 40% health. Once in a while, Servant of Night bites the enemy with the highest max health. Each second, the target takes magic damage equal to 10% of their max health. Servant of the Night restores health equal to the damage dealt by the ability. Additionally, while the target is suffering from the bite, it can’t use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). The bite lasts until the target of the ability or Servant of the Night dies. If the target of the ability dies, Servant of the Night has a 65% chance to immediately bite a new target. If Servant of the Night dies, all allies have their health, damage, pierce and magic pierce increased by 50% for 10 sec. While a target is bitten, Servant of the Night can’t bite another.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When Servant of the Night’s set ability silences or fears an enemy it deals 300000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it.

description 4/6

When Servant of the Night’s set ability silences or fears an enemy it deals 300000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. When Servant of the Night deals pure damage with a set ability, it also deals pure damage equal to 25% of its max health to another unit with the lowest current health and restores health to an ally equal to the damage dealt by the ability. If the ability kills a target, Servant of the Night has a 75% chance to resurrect a random ally with 30% health.

description 6/6

When Servant of the Night’s set ability silences or fears an enemy it deals 300000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. When Servant of the Night deals pure damage with a set ability, it also deals pure damage equal to 40% of its max health to another unit with the lowest current health and restores health to an ally equal to the damage dealt by the ability. If the ability kills a target, Servant of the Night has a 90% chance to resurrect a random ally with 40% health. Every 2 bite causes an explosion that deals 250000 pure damage in a small area around the target of the bite.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

If you use the set’s fear or silence ability, Servant of the Night gains a shield that absorbs 20% damage for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

description 4/6

If you use the set’s fear or silence ability, Servant of the Night gains a shield that absorbs 20% damage for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. When Servant of the Night restores health to an ally with the set ability, it also heals itself for the same amount.

description 6/6

If you use the set’s fear or silence ability, Servant of the Night gains a shield that absorbs 20% damage for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. When Servant of the Night restores health to an ally with the set ability, it also heals itself for the same amount. While the enemy bitten by Servant of the Night is on the battlefield, Servant of the Night takes 25% less damage.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

For the duration of the battle, Servant of the Night and all allies have their magic pierce increased by 25%.

description 4/6

For the duration of the battle, Servant of the Night and all allies have their magic pierce increased by 25%. When Servant of Night deals pure damage with a set ability, if the target doesn’t die, it is stunned for 4 sec and has its magic armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec.

description 6/6

For the duration of the battle, Servant of the Night and all allies have their magic pierce increased by 25%. When Servant of Night deals pure damage with a set ability, if the target doesn’t die, it is stunned for 4 sec and has its magic armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Every second, the bitten unit’s magic armor is reduced by 10%. Stacks up to 7 times.

Materials

Candle of the Night
Dark Personality

Gem Bay chest
Tomato Juice

purchase in:
Dungeon chest

purchase in:
Arena battle
Eternal Enemy

purchase in:
